query:
SELECT 
  transaction_type,
  transaction_sub_type,
  action,
  underlying_symbol,
  symbol,
  strike_price,
  expires_at,
  quantity,
  net_value,
  value,
  description,
  executed_at
FROM cached_transactions
WHERE transaction_sub_type = 'Assignment'
   OR transaction_sub_type LIKE '%Assign%'
   OR description LIKE '%Assigned%'
   OR description LIKE '%assignment%'
ORDER BY executed_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
